basics.name: Puspak Chakraborty
basics.label: M.S. Research Scholar
basics.summary: M.S. Research Scholar in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence at IIT Madras, investigating the theoretical and empirical equivalence between Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) and boosting algorithms. Experienced Specialist Programmer with a demonstrated history of working with serverless data pipelines, REST APIs, and MLOps.

work.name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras
work.summary: Researching in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence under the M.S. program.
highlights: Investigating Decision Trees, Boosting and Deep Neural Networks.
Developing Boosting architectures that use neural routers for intelligent spatial partitioning to handle heteroscedastic noise.

Publications: Puspak Chakraborty, Arun Rajkumar. “Neural Routed Boosting: Robust Learning against Heteroscedastic Noise.” Accepted at the Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI) 2026. To appear in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR).

work.name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras
work.summary: Assisting in course operations and providing academic support.
highlights: Foundations of Machine Learning (DA5400): Facilitated course operations and provided academic support for approximately 150 students (July 2025 – Nov 2025).
Mathematical Foundations of Data Science (DA5000): Assisted in course operations for about 90 students (Jan 2025 – May 2025).

work.name: Infosys
work.summary: Worked as a Specialist Programmer developing cloud-based enterprise solutions.
highlights: Developed serverless data pipelines using AWS SQS-triggered Lambda functions for a legal domain product.
Designed REST APIs and optimized existing enterprise codebase, significantly improving processing efficiency.

education.institution: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
highlights: Investigating the theoretical and empirical equivalence between Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) and boosting algorithms.
Developing Boosting architectures that use neural routers for intelligent spatial partitioning to handle heteroscedastic noise.

awards.title: KLA Image Restoration Hackathon
awards.summary: Secured Rank 11 out of 61 teams in KLA Image Restoration Hackathon, hosted by Computer Science Department, IIT Madras.

awards.title: GATE 2024 (Computer Science)
awards.summary: Secured All India Rank (AIR) 439 / 123,967 candidates in GATE 2024 (Computer Science), GATE Score: 765/1000.

publications.name: Neural Routed Boosting: Robust Learning against Heteroscedastic Noise
publications.summary: Accepted at the Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI) 2026. To appear in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR).

projects.name: Polyvox: Optimized Edge AI Acoustic Pipeline
projects.summary: Engineered a highly optimized edge AI acoustic processing pipeline utilizing a dynamic routing system and Pyannote diarization.
highlights: Trained and finetuned Sandglasset model on customized dynamic LibriMix dataset.
Enhanced the intent classification engine's robustness by generating custom datasets incorporating comprehensive slots and phonetic error dictionaries.

projects.name: Handdrawn Image Classifier System with Feedback
projects.summary: Architected a containerized FastAPI web app for real-time doodle classification with human-in-the-loop feedback using FastAPI, MLflow, Docker, Prometheus, and DVC.
highlights: Built an automated retraining pipeline using DVC, Git, and MLflow for seamless dataset versioning and model updates.
Implemented system observability with Prometheus, Grafana, and a PostgreSQL-backed dashboard for pipeline tracking.

projects.name: Seq2Seq Neural Machine Transliteration
projects.summary: Developed an Encoder-Decoder model (RNN/GRU/LSTM with Attention) for English to Hindi transliteration using PyTorch and WandB.
highlights: Implemented greedy and beam search decoding strategies with length penalties.
Orchestrated Bayesian hyperparameter tuning via Weights & Biases and built custom attention heatmap visualizations.
